title: dendranthema parvifolium
intro: Dendranthema parvifolium, commonly known as Creeping Chrysanthemum or Daisy Chrysanthemum, is a flowering perennial plant native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dendranthema parvifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
